en.name: Summer
en.effect: Once per turn: You can place Season Counters on this card equal to the number of your opponent's unused Main Monster Zones. Once per turn, when your monster declares an attack: You can inflict 400 damage to your opponent for each Season Counter on this card, and for each "Spring" in your GY. Once per turn, during your opponent's End Phase: You can take 1 Field Spell from your hand or Deck that you can place a Season Counter on, and place it face-up on your field (but neither player can activate its effects this turn), and if you do, place all Season Counters on this card on that card.

zh-CN.name: 夏
zh-CN.effect: ①：1回合1次，可以发动。依未使用的、对手的主要怪兽区域的数量，在此卡上放四季计数物。②：1回合1次，自己怪兽的攻击宣言时可以发动。给予对手此卡的四季计数物数量及自己墓地的“春”的数量×400的伤害。③：在对手的结束阶段可以发动。从手牌・牌组将1张可放四季计数物的场地魔法卡以表侧表示放在自己场上（此卡的四季计数物移至该卡）。该卡的效果此回合不可发动。
